summary: Re-test of Galdem A Talk static Swedish marketing site after OmOss UI fixes. Both previously reported HIGH bugs are now resolved. Desktop 1440: team photo (team3.jpg) is fully visible, elementFromPoint at 4 sampled points on the image all return IMG, and the purple offset decoration correctly renders behind/below creating the layered-paper effect. Mobile 375: document.documentElement.scrollWidth === window.innerWidth (375 === 375) — no horizontal overflow. Quick smoke confirmed nav, marquee (animation-name=marquee-right), 3 article external links with target=_blank (dn.se, dopest.se, ungmedia.se), Bli Medlem CTA pointing to the Google Form, 5 board items, and footer all still pass.
critical_code_review_comments: OmOss.jsx fix is correctly applied: decoration div is now rendered BEFORE the image wrapper, decoration uses z-0 (positive stacking context), image wrapper uses `relative z-10`. Right column (col-span-5) has `overflow-hidden` and section has `overflow-hidden` as well. Robust fix.

index.css `body { overflow-x: hidden }` is a defensible global safety net; confirmed at 375px there is no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth matches innerWidth). Note: overflow-x:hidden on <body> can occasionally break `position: sticky` children in some stacking contexts, but no sticky elements are in use in this codebase, so safe.
No other regressions detected in smoke pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 1 reported two HIGH bugs in OmOss.jsx (purple decoration covering photo; 18px horizontal overflow at 375px). Iteration 2 confirms BOTH are fixed. No further issues. If any new feature is added near OmOss, recheck that section's overflow-hidden is not accidentally removed and that image wrapper keeps `relative z-10`.
rca of the issue: Previous RCA (iteration_1) identified two root causes in the same OmOss ribbon block: (a) Tailwind `-z-0` = z-index:0 (not negative), so the later DOM sibling (decoration) painted on top of the image; (b) the decoration's translate(16px,18px) pushed its bounding box past the right column edge with no overflow-clip. Iteration 2 verification: fix applied by swapping DOM order (decoration rendered first), assigning `relative z-10` to the image wrapper, adding `overflow-hidden` on right column + section, and `overflow-x:hidden` on body. Runtime DOM/CSS snapshot confirms decoZ=0 pos=absolute, imgWrapZ=10 pos=relative, decoIsBefore=true; all 4 sampled points on the image return IMG as topmost; mobile scrollWidth==innerWidth==375.
